title: citrus × floridana
intro: Citrus × floridana, also known as the Florida yuzu, is a hybrid citrus plant that combines characteristics from the yuzu (Citrus junos) and the tangelo (a cross between a tangerine and a grapefruit). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of citrus × floridana include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Citrus × floridana can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, essential oils, and juices, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
